name: Dr. Karthik Sundaram
bio: Dr. Karthik Sundaram leads the Autonomous Agents Lab where he develops deep reinforcement learning algorithms for multi-robot coordination in warehouse automation and search-and-rescue scenarios. His group created a distributed RL framework that allows heterogeneous robots to learn cooperative policies without centralized training data, reducing communication overhead by 80 percent over prior methods. He has deployed RL-based controllers on a fleet of 12 autonomous mobile robots at a Flipkart fulfillment center. His recent work on safe RL with formal verification of learned policies is funded by DST.
